info.title: FSI
info.description:
### Overview

**Version:** 1.0.0  
**Specification:** OpenAPI 3.0  
**Base URL:** `https://api.vh3connect.io/api:kP8T1CK7`  

The FSI (Field Service Intelligence) API provides AI-powered analytics, automation, and data management for field service operations. It transforms raw job, engineer, customer, and site data into actionable intelligence through semantic search, knowledge graphs, automated briefings, and operational monitoring.

---

#### Authentication

All endpoints require an API key passed in the `X-API-Key` header:

```
X-API-Key: your-api-key-here
```

Requests without a valid API key will receive a `401 Unauthorised` response.

---

#### Common Response Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|---|---|
| **200** | Success |
| **201** | Created (resource successfully created) |
| **400** | Bad Request - invalid or missing parameters |
| **401** | Unauthorised - missing or invalid API key |
| **404** | Not Found - the requested resource does not exist |
| **409** | Conflict - a task is already running for this resource |
| **422** | Validation Error - request understood but semantically invalid |
| **429** | Rate Limited - too many requests |
| **500** | Internal Server Error |

---

#### Endpoint Categories

##### AI & Search
- **POST /agent/ask** - Natural-language Q&A powered by Weaviate
- **POST /agent/search** - Natural-language search returning structured job objects
- **POST /investigate** - Multi-step hybrid investigation across vector and graph data
- **GET /search/autocomplete** - Fuzzy autocomplete across customers, engineers, jobs, and sites
- **POST /search/intake** - Semantic search over job intake descriptions
- **POST /search/intake/enriched** - Semantic search with Neo4j graph enrichment
- **POST /search/outcomes** - Semantic search over job outcome summaries

##### Connie AI Assistant
- **POST /connie/chat** - Chat with the Connie AI assistant
- **POST /connie/chat/voice** - Voice chat with Connie
- **POST /connie/generate-summary** - Generate an AI summary for a contact
- **POST /connie/history/search** - Search conversation history
- **GET /connie/sessions** - List chat sessions
- **GET /connie/sessions/{session_id}/messages** - Get messages for a session

##### Jobs & Aggregation
- **GET /jobs/feed** - Paginated job feed with multi-filter support
- **GET /jobs/{job_id}** - Get a single job with full details
- **POST /aggregate/jobs** - Job metrics with groupBy dimensions and period comparison

##### Data Ingestion
- **POST /ingest/job** - Ingest a single job
- **POST /ingest/jobs** - Bulk job ingestion
- **POST /ingest/job/intake** - Intake a new job from an external system
- **POST /ingest/job/completed** - Mark a job as completed
- **PATCH /ingest/job/status** - Update job status
- **POST /ingest/csv** - Ingest data from a CSV file
- **POST /ingest/contacts** - Ingest contacts for a company
- **POST /ingest/driving** - Ingest driving data
- **POST /ingest/email** - Ingest an email for job extraction

##### Email Triage
- **POST /triage/classify** - Classify an incoming email
- **GET /triage/categories** - List available triage categories
- **GET /ingest/email/pending** - List pending email extractions
- **POST /ingest/email/confirm** - Confirm a pending extraction
- **POST /ingest/email/reject** - Reject a pending extraction

##### Backfill & Welcome Pack
- **POST /backfill/collect** - Start a historical data backfill
- **GET /backfill/collect/tasks** - List backfill tasks
- **GET /backfill/collect/{task_id}** - Get backfill task status
- **POST /welcome-pack/generate** - Generate a welcome pack analysis
- **GET /welcome-pack/{company_id}/latest** - Get latest welcome pack

##### Knowledge Graph
- **POST /graph/query** - Query the knowledge graph with presets and filters
- **GET /graph/presets** - List available graph query presets

##### Briefings & Reports
- **POST /briefing/generate** - Generate an engineer pre-visit briefing
- **POST /reports/generate** - Generate a report
- **GET /reports/sections** - List available report sections

##### Sentinels (Monitoring)
- **POST /sentinels/run** - Run sentinel checks
- **POST /sentinels/run/{sentinel_id}** - Run a specific sentinel
- **GET /sentinels/registry** - List all sentinel definitions
- **GET /sentinels/results** - Get latest sentinel results

##### Poller (Data Sync)
- **POST /poller/start** - Start polling for a company
- **POST /poller/stop** - Stop polling
- **POST /poller/poll** - Trigger an immediate poll
- **GET /poller/status** - Get all poller statuses
- **GET /poller/status/{company_id}** - Get poller status for a company

##### Cases (Issue Tracking)
- **POST /cases/create** - Create a new case
- **GET /cases/list** - List cases with filtering
- **GET /cases/search** - Full-text search across cases
- **GET /cases/{case_id}** - Get case details
- **PATCH /cases/{case_id}** - Update a case
- **POST /cases/{case_id}/transition** - Transition case status
- **POST /cases/{case_id}/comments** - Add a comment
- **GET /cases/{case_id}/activity** - Get case activity timeline
- **POST /cases/{case_id}/participants** - Add a participant
- **POST /cases/{case_id}/items** - Link an item to a case

##### Intelligence Profiles
- **POST /intelligence/generate-profiles** - Generate intelligence profiles
- **GET /intelligence/profiles/{company_id}** - List profiles for a company
- **GET /intelligence/profiles/{company_id}/types/{type_id}** - Get a specific profile

##### Weather
- **GET /weather/forecast** - Get weather forecast
- **GET /weather/historical** - Get historical weather data
- **GET /weather/for-job/{job_id}** - Weather for a specific job
- **GET /weather/for-site** - Weather for a specific site

##### Media & Utilities
- **POST /media/transcribe** - Transcribe media content
- **GET /health** - Health check

---

#### Pagination

List endpoints return paginated results. Use the `page` and `per_page` (or `limit`) query parameters to navigate through pages. Response metadata includes `total`, `page`, and `pages` where applicable.

---

#### Task-Based Endpoints

Long-running operations (backfill, welcome pack, ingestion) return a `task_id` immediately. Poll the corresponding status endpoint to track progress:

```json
{
  "task_id": "abc-123",
  "status": "running",
  "progress": 45,
  "message": "Processing batch 5 of 11"
}
```

Possible statuses: `pending`, `running`, `completed`, `failed`, `cancelled`.

post.summary:
Tenant-facing preseeds list. Same query logic as the internal endpoint
 in the utilities group, but adds a vh3_api_key precondition so external
 callers (the future Connect frontend admin UI, n8n nodes, etc.) must
 present a valid tenant apiKey for the company they're querying.

 FSI's internal Connie loader does NOT call this endpoint — it uses
 `utilities/preseeds/list_internal` because chat sessions don't carry a
 tenant apiKey.
post.description:
Tenant-facing preseeds list. Same query logic as the internal endpoint in the utilities group, but adds a vh3_api_key precondition so external callers (the future Connect frontend admin UI, n8n nodes, etc.) must present a valid tenant apiKey for the company they're querying. FSI's internal Connie loader does NOT call this endpoint — it uses `utilities/preseeds/list_internal` because chat sessions don't carry a tenant apiKey.

Authentication: not required

scope.description: Visibility scope: global=every session for this company, user=only when scope_user_id matches, entity=only when scope_entity_type+scope_entity_id match

category.description: What kind of guidance this preseed encodes

content.description: The preseed text (freeform markdown/plain) injected into the agent context

priority.description: Sort order within scope tier (lower = injected earlier)

created_by.description: User id who created (null for programmatic / system)

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed access the requested resource.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

api_key.description: Tenant API key (validated against vh3_api_key table)

user_id.description: Optional. When set, includes user-scoped preseeds for this user only.

entity_type.description: Optional. Required together with entity_id to pull entity-scoped preseeds.

api_key.description: Tenant API key (validated against vh3_api_key table)

user_id.description: Optional. When set, includes user-scoped preseeds for this user only.

entity_type.description: Optional. Required together with entity_id to pull entity-scoped preseeds.
